ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the company's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equity_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equity score entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the score belongs to */,
  "summary_score" TEXT /* Equity summary score from StarMine */,
  "score_change" TEXT /* Change in equity summary score over the past month */,
  "ibes_estimate" REAL /* I/B/E/S estimate from Refinitiv */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the score was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the equity summary score */,
  "sector_performance" TEXT /* Performance of the sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_performance" TEXT /* Performance of the market on the date the score was recorded */,
  "analyst_recommendation" TEXT /* Analyst recommendations related to the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equity_scores_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "esg_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ESG rating entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the rating belongs to */,
  "overall_rating" TEXT /* Overall ESG rating from MSCI */,
  "environmental_score" TEXT /* Environmental score from MSCI */,
  "social_score" TEXT /* Social score from MSCI */,
  "governance_score" TEXT /* Governance score from MSCI */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the ESG rating */,
  "industry_comparison" TEXT /* Comparison of the company's ESG rating within its industry */,
  "sector_comparison" TEXT /* Comparison of the company's ESG rating within its sector */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to the detailed ESG report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the ESG rating was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_esg_ratings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object defining the permissions for each role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the role information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., score change, rating update) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "trigger_threshold" REAL /* Threshold that triggered the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_scores" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical score entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the score belongs to */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date of the score entry */,
  "summary_score" TEXT /* Equity summary score from StarMine on that date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical score */,
  "sector_performance" TEXT /* Performance of the sector on the date of the score */,
  "market_performance" TEXT /* Performance of the market on the date of the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_scores_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_esg_ratings" (
  "history_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical ESG rating entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the rating belongs to */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating entry */,
  "overall_rating" TEXT /* Overall ESG rating from MSCI on that date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical ESG rating */,
  "industry_comparison" TEXT /* Comparison of the company's ESG rating within its industry on the date of the rating */,
  "sector_comparison" TEXT /* Comparison of the company's ESG rating within its sector on the date of the rating */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to the detailed ESG report for the historical rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_esg_ratings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
